features.name: Pulse
features.description: Activity feed with notes, social posts, and agent activity

features.name: Workspace Rail
features.description: Far-left rail for switching relays with cross-relay unread indicators

features.name: Forum Channels
features.description: Forum-style threaded channels for long-form discussions

features.name: Eager timeline layout
features.description: Lay out every fetched message row immediately instead of skipping offscreen rows (content-visibility). Heights are exact from the start, so scrolling never triggers height re-realizations or position corrections mid-fling — at the cost of a one-time layout of the full loaded window.
